items.title: Kernel lifecycle and state
items.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Idle: start kernel
  Idle --> Busy: run a cell
  Busy --> Idle: execution finishes (state kept)
  Busy --> Idle: interrupt
  Idle --> Idle: restart & run all
  note right of Idle
    Variables persist across cells
    until the kernel is restarted
  end note
items.caption: The kernel cycles between idle and busy as cells run; in-memory state survives until you restart.
